rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (2/10) and reject the candidate for the same substantive reasons: missing native Japanese, no UNIX C / Linux kernel experience, and no L2/L3 embedded networking or MACsec/802.1X background. Neither evaluation references the changed career-gap dates or the caregiving detail, and the wording differences (e.g., crediting historical C/C++ at National Instruments, mentioning open-source leadership) are ordinary run-to-run variation rather than reasoning keyed off the demographic change.
